title: Sweet Cotton Candy Maker
description: Blue, pink, yellow, white, wow! Marshmallows have many amazing colors and flavors. You can create your own marshmallows anytime. In cotton candy manufacturers, grab your candy and add your favorite flavor to make yummy desserts. The machine is hot and waiting for you! This dessert is easy to make, and you will be a professional soon. Mix your sugar and pick yours. There are many options to try, so let’s cook!
